## Checklist

- [ ] `poetry run pytest -v` passes with no failures
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] No docstrings or explanatory comments added
- [ ] Each new class is in its own file under `src/tfversion/`
- [ ] Imports are ordered: stdlib → third-party → local
